notes: C++ template-instantiation compile error in pandas's perf branch (xsimd::neon64 vs xsimd::neon mismatch). Adds compile_error case (v1.3 had 1/16, v2 now has 2). First v2 case with `c-cpp-cmake` ecosystem and primary_language=cpp — fills another v1.3 gap (was 0/16, target 2 in v2). Note: project uses meson+ninja rather than CMake, but `c-cpp-cmake` is the closest matching ecosystem in the v2 enum. multi_failure=false because both compile-unit failures share one root cause (the header-level extern template declaration is wrong).
